name: Small
official_rules_text: A unit that has 1 or more Counterpart miniatures with the Small keyword cannot be targeted with attacks if the attacking unit leader only has LOS to the Counterpart miniature with the Small keyword
description: A unit that has 1 or more Counterpart miniatures with the Small keyword cannot be targeted with attacks if the attacking unit leader only has LOS to the Counterpart miniature with the Small keyword
